rationale: Faithful AS-IS implementation of frozen v15 Task 4a (incl. AM-40 PACKAGE_ROOTS + AM-41 enforced profile) with no reinterpretation or scope expansion. inventory.mjs commits exact sorted PACKAGE_ROOTS/EXCLUDE (AM-40 completeness unit over tracked package.json), DOC_ROOTS + docs/runs + self-weave exclusions, sorted CONTRACT_FILES (D31), empty LEDGER_SOURCES + RUN_SOURCES, five weaver ids + integer versions, REQUIRED_INVENTORY_IDS exactly matching the frozen normative table (unit-proven equality + freeze), LOADER_CAPABLE_BUILTIN_SAFE_EXPORTS exactly {module,node:module} -> ["builtinModules","isBuiltin"] (deep-equal + deep-freeze + mutation-fail units), and ONLY git+code WEAVER_IMPL_FILES equal to their accepted D33 closures (no nonexistent files; D17/AM-17). util.mjs exports the single shared D33 classifier+resolver (AM-34 test 19), dependency-free comment/string-aware lexer + Phase-1 export scanner, real-file walker (root-escape/symlink reject), D26/D29 counted-iterator (count-only-on-complete; driver-held accessor only), D21 physicalContainment (lstat every original component, never follow), and exact no-shell git allowlist. test-closure.mjs derives closures via the shared classifier/resolver, proves committed inventories EQUAL derived (never trusted), covers every accepted form via form-only fixtures + recursion/cycles/unreachable-literal + all fatal/no-edge modes (incl. AM-41 b1-b6 fail-closed + original-component symlink). git.mjs uses exact `git log -S<symbol> --format=%H --reverse -- <path>` / `git log --format=%H --reverse -- <path>`, first SHA, git:<sha>, malformed fatal, no-result warn. code.mjs emits all four depends-on shapes (symbol/file threading), unrepresentable-consumer only for unresolvable, unused/no-edge, dedup. Zero runtime deps, ESM, permitted imports only, spine read-only, gate green (tests/closures/frozen-table/D32). Orchestrator/4b/5/D34 deferred as required. Stakeable.
